observations.summary: The phrase 'kept his eyes ahead and put one foot in front of the other' echoes the recurring motif of perseverance and forward movement despite hardship throughout the narrative.

source_evidence.quote: So he kept his eyes ahead and put one foot in front of the other.

observations.target_hint: This motif parallels earlier descriptions of Dan's journey north, emphasizing steady progress despite physical and spiritual burdens.

target_evidence.quote: The road ahead would be long, and indeed, the journey already felt vast, the hours stretching thin and quiet, measured only by the steady rhythm of his wandering thoughts, a low, constant murmur in his mind.
He had woken before the sun... his mind was clear, sharp, and eager to embark on the road ahead.
